params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 V6-D notion test flow update — page injection infrastructure ALREADY DEPLOYED in engine (page_inject_h1 + page_inject_h2 since 2026-04-30 47차). To trigger: after PII submit, HARD RELOAD same-tab. Engine intercepts page-load text/html GET when last_pii_block_at_ms within 5 min window → returns synthetic warning HTML page.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt — engine fires V6-B SSE block on /api/v3/runInferenceTranscript
3. Wait 3 sec for block to register (last_pii_block_at_ms set)
4. ★ HARD RELOAD same tab (Cmd+Shift+R / Ctrl+Shift+R) — fires page-load GET
5. Engine on_http2_response should see is_page_load + recent block → page_inject_h2 → returns synthetic warning HTML page
6. Browser displays warning page (NOT normal Notion UI)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning HTML page rendered after reload + production log shows page_inject_h2
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_block_ok_but_reload_doesnt_injec: PII block fires (V6-B) but reload doesn't trigger page injection — investigate is_page_load flag for notion

notes: 48차 V6-D test flow — engine page_injection already deployed, just need reload step to trigger. Audit decision: state/decisions/20260506_215000_5A_V6D_infrastructure_already_deployed_test_flow_update_needed.json.
